rationale: The citing paper explicitly states it extends the marketing state-dependence demand literature into supply-side pricing inference, and the cited paper is a core scanner-data demand model with dynamic familiarity/variety-seeking SKU choice in packaged goods. There is strong construct and domain overlap (state dependence, variety seeking, household scanner panels, large CPG categories), suggesting the citation may be methodological/foundational rather than incidental. Given this plausible substantive role, it should be retained for full relation judgment.
